app.title: MacType Control Center
files.subtitle: Choose, import, save, and apply INI settings files used by MacType.
files.detectedDescription: The existing MacType installation contains the “{name}” profile. With your consent, a copy can be imported without changing the original.
files.currentDescription: Manage the profile being edited and its unsaved changes in one place.
files.importDescription: Choose an INI on this computer and copy its exact bytes into your personal profile folder.
files.duplicateDescription: Save the current settings under a new name in the app profile folder and switch to that file.
files.exportDescription: Save the settings being edited to a chosen location. The current profile and unsaved changes stay unchanged.
files.duplicated: Saved as {name} and switched the current profile.
files.applied: Applied {name} as the system-wide MacType profile.
overview.subtitle: Review the current installation and profile status.
overview.previewNeededDescription: The core files are present, but the 32-bit preview process has not started yet.
overview.nextDescription: Open an existing INI profile and review its settings. The original file remains unchanged until you save.
profiles.quickDescription: Work through the essential settings in order to create a solid base profile quickly.
profiles.advancedDescription: Directly tune every profile setting, including gamma, rendering, hinting, and exception rules.
wizard.unsavedWarning: The current preview values have not been saved to the profile yet.
wizard.savedState: The current values are saved in the profile.
wizard.guidance: Review each explanation and choose a value. Changes appear in the preview immediately.
profiles.addFontToList: Add a font to this list
profiles.emptyIndividuals: There are no font-specific settings. Empty values inherit the profile defaults.
profiles.previewAria: Text rendering preview for the current settings
profiles.previewImageAlt: Text preview rendered by MacType Helper
profiles.sampleText:
MacType Preview 123 ABC
The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog.
group.basic.label: Basic settings
group.basic.description: Configure hinting, kerning, and font loading.
group.shape.label: Glyph shape
group.shape.description: Adjust stroke weight, gamma, and contrast.
group.lcd.label: LCD and pixel layout
group.lcd.description: Configure subpixel order, filters, and per-channel tuning.
group.individual.label: Per-font settings
group.individual.description: Manage six values that apply only to a specific font.
group.lists.label: Include and exclude
group.lists.description: Edit font and application include or exclude lists.
list.excludeFonts.label: Excluded fonts
list.excludeFonts.help: Select installed fonts that MacType should skip
list.includeFonts.label: Included fonts
list.includeFonts.help: Select the only installed fonts MacType should process
list.excludeModules.label: Excluded applications
list.includeModules.label: Included applications
list.includeModules.help: When populated, process only these applications
execution.subtitle: Manage system-wide MacType application, public MacLoader launches, and tray startup.
execution.trayDescription: Starting in the tray observes the new Control Center service and launches registered apps. Sign-in startup itself never requests elevation.
execution.autostartTitle: Start in the tray at sign-in
execution.autostartDescription: Uses the per-user HKCU Run entry. Windows requests UAC approval only when system application is first prepared.
execution.autostartOn: Control Center will start in the tray when you sign in.
execution.manualDescription: Launch one selected program directly through the existing public MacLoader without invoking a shell.
execution.argumentsPlaceholder: Enter each required argument, such as a document path, on its own line
execution.systemDescription: Use the new Control Center service to apply the current profile to new processes or turn it off temporarily. The old MacTray service is migration-only.
execution.systemNote: System application changes require UAC approval. AppInit registry mode remains read-only because of its boot risk.
execution.systemActiveDescription: The verified service is running and broadly applies the current profile to new processes.
execution.systemInactiveDescription: Reopen the target app in this state to compare rendering without the applied settings.
execution.systemRunningUnverifiedTitle: Service running without verified system application
execution.systemRunningUnverifiedDescrip: The service is running, but verified system-wide rendering cannot be confirmed. Stop remains available for safe recovery.
execution.systemProfileMismatchTitle: Service running with a different profile
execution.systemProfileMismatchDescripti: The running generation does not match the profile expected by Control Center. Stop remains available; verified system application is not claimed.
execution.systemAppInitConflictDescripti: The new service is running, but AppInit registry mode prevents a verified system state. Stop remains available; other mutations stay blocked.
execution.systemUnavailableTitle: Service state is not ready for a primary action
execution.systemUnavailableDescription: Wait for the current service transition to finish, then refresh. Control Center will not start another mutation from this state.
execution.systemPaused: MacType system application is temporarily off.
execution.systemActivated: The current profile is now applied system-wide.
execution.serviceRegistryConflict: AppInit registry mode is active, so service installation and startup are blocked.
execution.serviceForeign: A service with the same name has an unexpected configuration. It will not be changed.
execution.profileNotMatched: Profile mismatch or not yet verified
execution.openServiceControlDescription: This is the open implementation installed and operated directly by Control Center. Windows requests elevation only for machine changes.
execution.legacyServiceDescription: This is the old MacTray service. Its state is read safely so it can be migrated, then removed only after verification.
execution.migrationConfirmDescription: Control Center will perform a verified, reversible migration in the following order.
execution.migrationConfirmStrictCheck: Checks AppInit and exact legacy service configuration before making changes.
execution.migrationConfirmBackup: Records the legacy service registry and current INI state, and makes an exact backup when a profile file exists.
execution.migrationConfirmSwitch: Stops the legacy service, then installs and starts the new service.
execution.migrationConfirmVerify: Requires Ready health, matching profile digest, and x86 and x64 smoke checks.
execution.migrationConfirmRollback: If any required step fails, Control Center rolls back the new service and restores the legacy state.
execution.migrationConfirmRemoval: This migration does not remove the legacy service. Removal remains a separate action after all verification succeeds.
execution.migrationComplete: Migration to the new service passed verification.
diagnostics.subtitle: Review component versions and recent activity.
diagnostics.logsDescription: Complete profile contents are never logged.
diagnostics.noHelperError: No Helper errors have been recorded.
settings.hinting_mode.label: Hinting mode
settings.hinting_mode.description: Choose how small glyphs align to the pixel grid.
settings.enable_kerning.label: Kerning
settings.enable_kerning.description: Apply spacing information for glyph pairs.
settings.font_loader.label: Font loader
settings.font_loader.description: Choose the engine used to load font outlines.
settings.font_link.label: Font linking
settings.font_link.description: Use Windows font linking information to supply missing characters.
settings.load_on_demand.label: Load on demand
settings.load_on_demand.description: Load font resources only when the core needs them.
settings.direct_write.label: DirectWrite support
settings.direct_write.description: Enable supported DirectWrite paths. This does not affect the GDI preview.
settings.normal_weight.label: Normal weight
settings.normal_weight.description: Fine-tune the stroke weight of regular fonts.
settings.bold_weight.label: Bold weight
settings.bold_weight.description: Fine-tune the stroke weight of bold fonts.
settings.italic_slant.label: Italic slant
settings.italic_slant.description: Adjust the slant applied to italic fonts.
settings.bolder_mode.label: Emboldening mode
settings.bolder_mode.description: Choose the direction used to thicken strokes.
settings.gamma_mode.label: Gamma mode
settings.gamma_mode.description: Choose the gamma method used for alpha blending.
settings.gamma_value.label: Gamma value
settings.gamma_value.description: Lower values make mid-density pixels appear darker.
settings.contrast.label: Contrast
settings.contrast.description: Adjust the contrast of rendered strokes.
settings.render_weight.label: Render weight
settings.anti_alias_mode.label: Antialiasing mode
settings.anti_alias_mode.description: Choose grayscale, RGB, BGR, or pixel-layout rendering.
settings.lcd_filter.label: LCD filter
settings.lcd_filter.description: Choose the base subpixel filter kernel.
settings.text_tuning.label: Grayscale tuning
settings.text_tuning.description: Adjust glyph edges for grayscale rendering.
settings.text_tuning_r.label: Red-channel tuning
settings.text_tuning_r.description: Adjust glyph edges for the red LCD subpixel.
settings.text_tuning_g.label: Green-channel tuning
settings.text_tuning_g.description: Adjust glyph edges for the green LCD subpixel.
settings.text_tuning_b.label: Blue-channel tuning
settings.text_tuning_b.description: Adjust glyph edges for the blue LCD subpixel.
settings.hint_small_font.label: Small-font hinting
settings.hint_small_font.description: Use a separate hinting path for small font sizes.
settings.max_bitmap.label: Maximum bitmap font size
settings.max_bitmap.description: Allow embedded bitmap glyphs up to this size. Zero means unlimited.
settings.max_height.label: Maximum rendering height
settings.max_height.description: Set the maximum font height handled by FreeType. Zero means unlimited.
settings.min_height.label: Minimum rendering height
settings.min_height.description: Set the minimum font height handled by FreeType.
profiles.applied: Applied {name} to the live system-wide MacType path.
execution.profileNotApplied: No profile has been applied yet
execution.registeredDescription: At sign-in or from the tray command, these apps start through MacLoader with the applied user profile.
execution.registered: Added the app to the tray injection list.
execution.removed: Removed the app from the tray injection list.
